raw_title: Response to the 2025 ICA Presidential Address: Whose cosmopolitan imagination? African reflections on Silvio Waisbord’s call for global communication studies
title_en: Response to the 2025 ICA Presidential Address: Whose cosmopolitan imagination? African reflections on Silvio Waisbord’s call for global communication studies
title_zh: 对2025年ICA主席演讲的回应：谁的全球想象？非洲对Silvio Waisbord全球传播研究呼吁的反思
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章回应了2025年国际传播协会主席Silvio Waisbord关于全球传播研究的演讲，从非洲视角探讨了全球传播研究中的权力和代表性问题。作者质疑当前全球传播研究中的主导想象，并提出了非洲学者如何参与和塑造这一领域的思考。
plain_summary_en: This article responds to the 2025 ICA Presidential Address by Silvio Waisbord on global communication studies, examining issues of power and representation in the field from an African perspective. The author questions whose cosmopolitan imagination dominates current global communication research and explores how African scholars can participate in and shape this academic discourse.
research_direction_zh: 探讨全球传播研究中的权力动态、知识生产的地缘政治以及非西方视角在学术话语中的融入，推动更加包容和多元的传播研究范式。
research_direction_en: Examining power dynamics in global communication studies, the geopolitics of knowledge production, and the integration of non-Western perspectives into academic discourse to foster more inclusive and diverse research paradigms.
